phases.name: Foundation

phases.summary: Repo, Go service, migrations, CI, deploy workflow, nginx route, and public health endpoints are live.

phases.name: Auth
phases.label: Complete
phases.summary: Signup, login, refresh, logout, and current-user endpoints passed live end-to-end verification.

phases.name: SMTP
phases.label: Gmail pending
phases.summary: Encrypted storage, custom ForwardEmail verification, delete, list, verify, and primary selection are working.

phases.name: Resume
phases.label: Complete
phases.summary: PDF upload, pdftotext parsing, storage, list, activate, and delete were verified on the deployed service.

phases.name: Preferences
phases.label: Complete
phases.summary: Preferences GET and full-replace PUT round-trip arrays, remote flag, tone preset, and addendum.

checkpoints.title: Custom SMTP verified
checkpoints.summary: smtp.forwardemail.net:465 verified through the public API with encrypted storage and no password leakage in responses.

checkpoints.title: SMTP primary route verified
checkpoints.summary: Two dummy SMTP credentials were created live and exactly one primary credential was confirmed through API and Postgres.

checkpoints.title: Preferences live verified
checkpoints.summary: GET and PUT preferences round-tripped arrays, remote_only, tone_preset, and tone_addendum through API and database.

checkpoints.title: Resume live verified
checkpoints.summary: A generated PDF was uploaded, parsed, stored, activated, listed, deleted, and confirmed removed from container storage.

checkpoints.title: Auth live verified
checkpoints.summary: Signup, login, refresh rotation, current user, logout, and rejected post-logout refresh all passed against the VPS.
